chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-5090 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of main case.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 01.04.2026 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for the Respondent/KMC..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This petition concerns non-payment of pensionary benefits to the petitioner, Mst. Shahida, widow of late Waris Masih, Sanitary Worker (BPS-02), KMC, who expired on 01.10.2024. Learned counsel for KMC submitted that a letter has been written to the Municipal Commissioner, TMC Nazimabad, Karachi, to process and disburse the pensionary benefits; however, learned counsel for the respondents submits that the pensionary benefits of the petitioner shall be paid in one week. This petition stands disposed of in the aforesaid statement. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
